laws: FOUNDER_CANON v1 + governed-autorun v3. Violations = BLOCKED_WITH_REASON.
founder_authorization: founder-order-1000-plan-cloud-factory-20260709T014708Z (receipts/p0pgr/founder/) — design-only unlock; building, deploying, scheduling NOT unlocked
build_state: NOT BUILT. This file is a DESIGN artifact. The base model exists today as scripts/p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1.py; the v1 modifier layer, ranking glue, and eligibility computation are TO BE BUILT in phase PF-B. Nothing in this file claims built, active, or verified state.
determinism: Deterministic, no LLM in the formula. Every input is a plan-record field (roi_priors, risk_class, cost_cap_usd, model_policy.default_tier, line_plan) or a receipt count from prior factory runs. LLM output never enters scoring (deterministic core D7: LLM output is a proposal, validator gates persistence).

base_model.name: p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1
base_model.implementation: scripts/p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1.py — existing P0-PGR phase 2 ranker, UNCHANGED by this package
base_model.axis_scale: each axis scored 0-5 (plan roi_priors uses the same five axes)
base_model.law: The plan ranker NEVER invents a new base model. Plan roi_priors reuses the identical five axes and 35/25/15/15/10 weights, and ranked plan packets flow through the same phase2 queue as every other packet (integration law: consume adjacent live systems as inputs, never duplicate their queues).

constants.reuse_qualifying_run: a prior run of the same plan_id whose FL8 verdict is PASS from the external verifier path (secondary CF account edge receipt) — never builder self-report (autonomy loop L3 pass_rule)
constants.blocked_target_condition: any line in the plan's line_plan has a dormant or unusable primary execution target today
blocked_targets_today: claude_cloud_agent — dormant, blocker B2 inherited from cloud-factory/MVP_ACTIVATION_PLAN_v0.md §8 (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not wired in GH Actions secrets)
cloudflare_worker as FL7 primary — Cloudflare tool_law defers CF control plane to Phase 3/4; FL8's existing secondary-account read/verify path (worker sina-governance-ssot-advisory) is NOT blocked

modifiers.rationale: Higher-risk plan types (deploy, revenue, compliance_governance, automation_cron) rank lower by default so low-risk receipt-earning work drains first; a penalty never bypasses approvals — high-risk transitions still require founder/client approval regardless of score.
modifiers.law_ref: founder order rule 7 (founder/client approves high-risk transitions); FOUNDER_CANON v1 §7 observe-before-promote

modifiers.rationale: A plan template that has repeatedly survived external verification is cheaper and safer to run again; the bonus counts only FL8 external PASS receipts, so autonomy expands on receipt streaks, never on self-report or chat approval.
modifiers.law_ref: autonomy loop L3-ADVERSARIAL pass_rule (PASS only from secondary CF account edge receipt); L8 earned-autonomy expansion_rules (receipt streaks)

modifiers.rationale: Rewards plans that promise high base value per capped dollar; the max(cost_cap_usd, 0.01) floor keeps the formula defined for a zero cap. The bonus reads the plan's declared cost_cap_usd — every plan carries a cost cap by schema (order rule 5).
modifiers.law_ref: governed-autorun L11 (cost metering); roi_positive gate; founder order rule 5 (every plan has a cost cap)

modifiers.formula: constants.premium_model_penalty if (model_policy.default_tier == 'judgment' and score_base < constants.premium_model_score_floor) else 0
modifiers.rationale: Structural expression of 'no premium models unless ROI justifies': a judgment-tier plan whose base score is under 60 ranks 10 points lower, so cheaper-tier plans drain first. Complements (does not replace) model_policy.premium_rule, which gates judgment tier to weighted score >= 60 OR an explicit founder order naming it.
modifiers.law_ref: founder order rule 4 (no premium models unless ROI justifies); PLAN_SCHEMA_v1 model_policy.premium_rule

modifiers.formula: constants.blocked_target_penalty if any(primary_target_dormant_or_unusable_today(line) for line in plan.line_plan) else 0
modifiers.rationale: A plan whose line_plan depends on a target that cannot execute today (see constants.blocked_targets_today) would stall in the queue; ranking it lower keeps runnable work draining first. This is a ranking signal only — it never marks the plan BLOCKED and never substitutes for the activation dependency being resolved by the founder.
modifiers.law_ref: cloud-factory/MVP_ACTIVATION_PLAN_v0.md §8 known blockers (B2 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY; CF tool_law Phase 3/4 deferral); continuity law (never default to STOP — degrade and keep the lane moving)

score_v1: clamp(score_base + risk_penalty + reuse_bonus + cost_efficiency_bonus + premium_model_penalty + blocked_target_penalty, 0, 100)

auto_dispatch_gate.purpose: Computes ELIGIBILITY only. The model never dispatches anything. Dispatch approval is a founder receipt per template; auto_dispatch.eligible is const false in every v1 plan record.
machine_conditions_all_must_hold: reuse_bonus == 5 (at least 5 prior runs of this plan_id with FL8 external PASS)
zero sandbox wall violations (W1-W9) across those qualifying runs
actual cost under cost_cap_usd in all qualifying runs
auto_dispatch_gate.founder_condition_mandatory: a per-template founder receipt in receipts/p0pgr/founder/ naming the plan_id AND plan_version — never class-wide, never chat-only (M03 lesson: chat authorization is not durable evidence)
auto_dispatch_gate.gate_note: Even when all four machine conditions hold, eligibility is a PROPOSAL surfaced to the founder queue (order rule 8: auto-dispatch per-template only, later). No v1 component may flip auto_dispatch.eligible; that flip is a per-template founder receipt in a later phase (PF-E).

examples.label: PLAN-0501 (verification band): clean low-risk plan earning the cost-efficiency bonus
examples.note: Hypothetical worked example over a seed plan record — no run has occurred; the substrate is NOT BUILT.

modifier_computation.reuse_bonus: 0 qualifying runs (no factory run exists at design time) -> 0
modifier_computation.blocked_target_penalty: FL8 primary is the existing secondary-CF-account read/verify path (not blocked; the CF deferral names FL7) and FL9 primary github_actions is usable -> 0

examples.label: PLAN-0901 (automation_cron band): high-risk plan hit by risk, premium-tier, and blocked-target penalties
examples.note: Hypothetical worked example over a seed plan record — no run has occurred; the substrate is NOT BUILT. Consistency note: with score_base 56.0 < 60, the judgment default_tier is lawful only under the second clause of model_policy.premium_rule (an explicit founder order naming it); the ranking penalty applies regardless. Schedule activation for automation_cron stays double-locked (FOUNDER-UNLOCK-CF-CRON + per-workflow founder activation) — ranking never unlocks it.

modifier_computation.reuse_bonus: 0 qualifying runs (no factory run exists at design time) -> 0
modifier_computation.blocked_target_penalty: FL1, FL2, FL5 primary target claude_cloud_agent is dormant today (blocker B2: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY not wired) -> -10

amendment_note: All thresholds live in the constants block so future amendments are one-line diffs ratified by founder receipt. This file amends nothing; it layers deterministic modifiers over the unchanged p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1 base model.
next: PF-B packet candidate: build the ranking glue (TO BE BUILT) that applies these modifiers over scripts/p0pgr_phase2_rank_v1.py output and reproduces both worked examples exactly (66.0 -> 71.0 and 56.0 -> 21.0) as its acceptance test
PF-B packet candidate: library validator (TO BE BUILT) rejects any plan whose line_plan names a line absent from cloud-factory/FACTORY_LINE_REGISTRY_v0.json before ranking runs
PF-E (later, founder-gated): first per-template auto-dispatch founder receipt naming a plan_id + plan_version once the four machine conditions hold on real receipts
